name: Selenide
description: Concise Java wrapper around Selenium WebDriver with automatic waits, PageObject support and simplified API designed to reduce flakiness.

seo.title: Selenide — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Selenide: Concise Java wrapper around Selenium WebDriver with automatic waits, PageObject support and simplified API designed to reduce flakiness.

when_to_use: Concise Java Selenium wrapper with built-in smart waits
PageObject-based web UI tests with reduced boilerplate
Automatic screenshot capture on assertion failures
Fluent $ and $$ selector API for web element interaction

pros: PageObject support out of the box
Great screenshot and logging on failure
cons: Playwright-Java is pulling ahead for new projects
review.verdict: The best way to use Selenium in Java, though Playwright-Java is the smarter default for new suites.
review.best_for: Java teams committed to Selenium WebDriver wanting cleaner APIs
review.not_for: New Java browser testing where Playwright offers lower flakiness
